personalization_hooks: Chief Estimator AND Estimating Manager — owns the bid list at a 50+ year Manitoba GC
Gateway since 1973 — institutional builder, deep MB roots; pitch Ashrah's 'protect the client's reputation' framing — that's literally what 50 years of reputation looks like
Diverse work: commercial, multifamily, institutional, renovations, industrial, bridges — high-frequency paint scope
Office on Archibald Street (East Winnipeg / Mission Junction)
Ahmad to mention the structured painter training program — a 50-year firm cares about workforce reliability
